name: Turtle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake batter according to the directions on the box.
2. Pour half of the batter into a 9x13 inch pan and bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
3. Peel the caramels and mix them with milk and melted butter (margarine).
4. Blend well until combined, then pour over the cake.
5. Sprinkle half of the chopped nuts and all of the chocolate chips over the caramel mixture.
6. Pour the remaining batter over the cake.
7. Sprinkle the rest of the chopped nuts over the top.
8. Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
